data.title: BingEx and Hangzhou partner to launch urban drone network for deliveries in China. Nasdaq-listed company.
data.description: In Beijing on October 9, 2025, BingEx Limited, listed on Nasdaq as FLX, has joined forces with Hangzhou city and local enterprises to introduce a city-wide initiative. BingEx, renowned for its business brand FlashEx, is a top on-demand dedicated courier service in China. This partnership is set to have a significant impact with aims to enhance service efficiency and cater to the rapidly growing demand for courier services in the region.

data.title: Leading Q3 gains driven by precious metals; gold and silver shine with central bank buying. Diversification is key for long-term performance.
data.description: During the third quarter, commodity prices saw a boost fueled by the rise of gold and silver, with central banks increasing their purchases. VanEck emphasizes the importance of diversifying investments across various sectors to maintain consistent long-term growth. This strategy saw significant gains, with gold prices hitting a rise of X% and silver prices increasing by Y%. The trend underscores the significance of spreading investments for sustainable performance in the market.

data.title: NVIDIA's Blackwell excels in InferenceMAX™ v1 benchmarks, showcasing impressive gains in performance and efficiency. (Read More)
data.description: The latest Blackwell architecture from NVIDIA has showcased remarkable improvements in performance and efficiency according to benchmarks conducted by SemiAnalysis's InferenceMAX™ v1. The results have established new benchmarks for AI hardware, demonstrating significant gains in performance and efficiency.
